data.title: Pundi AI and Vital Block Collaborate to Enhance Blockchain AI Data Security
data.description:
Pundi AI has announced a partnership with Vital Block, a next-generation blockchain security and smart contract auditing company, to enhance the credibility of on-chain AI data. According to Odaily, through Pundi AI's Data Pump, developers can convert datasets into on-chain assets known as Dataset Tokens (DTOKs). These verifiable data assets are available for use by AI agents, developers, and Web3 applications. As a security partner, Vital Block will provide professional auditing and team KYC for projects on Data Pump, ensuring that data assets are not only transparent but also undergo reliable security reviews, thereby reducing risks for developers and users.

Vital Block, with experience auditing over 1,850 blockchain projects, will offer exclusive discounts and comprehensive marketing support for projects launched through Pundi AI's Data Pump. This collaboration highlights the strong alliance between Pundi AI's open data layer and Vital Block's security expertise, setting higher standards for security and trust in AI data assets in the Web3 era. Both companies are part of the Circle Alliance program, committed to building the foundational infrastructure for the next generation of the internet.

data.title: Trader Closes Oracle Position with Significant Loss
data.description: On January 21, a trader known as the 'largest long position holder in on-chain gold' closed their xyz:ORCL position, incurring a loss of $199,000. According to BlockBeats, this transaction occurred 11 hours prior to the report. The trader continues to maintain a leveraged long position on PAX Gold (PAXG) with a 5x leverage. Additionally, they are heavily leveraged in a basket of on-chain U.S. stock tokens, including Apple, Intel, Micron Technology, AMD, and Palantir.

data.description: According to GMGN data, Meme Coin 1 on BSC surged over 60% in a short period, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $15 million, and is currently trading at approximately $13.5 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme Coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Addresses Concerns Over U.S. Debt Sales
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent expressed no concern over the sale of U.S. debt, linking it to fluctuations in Japanese government bonds. According to PANews, Besent mentioned maintaining communication with Japanese counterparts to ensure market stability. Denmark's position on U.S. debt was deemed insignificant, similar to the country's overall influence. Besent urged European allies to understand the necessity of Greenland becoming part of the United States and suggested they wait for U.S. President Donald Trump's address.

The World Economic Forum's schedule indicates that Trump is set to deliver a public speech in Davos at 21:30 UTC+8. However, Besent noted that President Trump would arrive in Davos approximately three hours late.

data.title: Binance Introduces New Yield Arena Offers with Flexible and Locked Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has unveiled new offerings in its Yield Arena, providing users with opportunities to earn rewards through various financial products. These offerings include Simple Earn, ETH Staking, SOL Staking, and Dual Investment, each designed to cater to different investment preferences and risk appetites.

The Earn Spotlight Limited-Time Offers feature USDe, where eligible users holding at least 0.01 USDe for 24 hours can enjoy a 5% APR from 2026-01-16 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-01-22 23:59 (UTC). Simple Earn subscribers to DOLO Flexible Products from 2026-01-17 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-03-17 23:59 (UTC) can earn up to 30% APR. Additionally, Dual Investment participants from 2026-01-09 01:00 (UTC) to 2026-01-31 23:59 (UTC) can earn up to $5,888 in rewards through the Monthly Leaderboard program.

The product offerings include Flexible Products such as USDT, USDC, ETH, and SOL, each with varying APRs and subscription limits. For instance, USDT offers a real-time APR of approximately 2% with a 5% bonus tiered APR, while USDC offers a real-time APR of approximately 2.5% with a similar bonus. Locked Products like SKY, NIL, and INJ offer fixed terms with specific APRs, such as SKY's 90-day term at 12.75% APR.

ETH and SOL Staking provide dynamic APRs, with ETH offering up to 2.5% and SOL up to 5.4%. Dual Investment allows users to engage in high-yield structured products with multiple settlement dates, offering 15% or more APR for BTC and ETH. Binance reserves the right to adjust APRs without prior notice, and offers are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Users can view their assets under the Earn section and may choose early redemption for Simple Earn Locked Products, with the principal returned to their Spot Accounts.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Plans Full Return to Decentralized Social Networks by 2026
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has announced his intention to fully return to decentralized social networks by 2026. According to Foresight News, Buterin has already begun this transition at the start of the year, using firefly.social to publish and read articles across platforms like X, Lens, Farcaster, and Bluesky. Despite Bluesky's 300-character limit, Buterin continues to engage with these platforms. He praised the Aave team's management of Lens and expressed optimism about its development over the next year, noting the enthusiasm of new team members for social media. Buterin plans to increase his activity on Lens and other decentralized platforms this year, encouraging others to do the same.

data.title: Gold's Breakout Signals Cautious Liquidity and Defensive Positioning
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. Gold's recent breakout is not a random occurrence but a significant signal in the financial markets. When gold trends upward in this manner, it typically indicates that liquidity is cautious and investors are positioning themselves defensively. This trend is seen as part of a broader macroeconomic backdrop rather than a threat to Bitcoin or other cryptocurrencies. The movement in gold suggests that the market is preparing for potential risks, highlighting a shift in investor sentiment towards safer assets.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin: 2026 will see a full return to decentralized social networking; competition and decentralization are the starting points for improving public discourse.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin stated that he plans to fully return to decentralized social networks in 2026, believing that a better society requires better large-scale communication tools. These tools should help people filter high-quality information and viewpoints, find consensus, and serve the long-term interests of users, rather than maximizing short-term interactions and emotional conflict. Vitalik pointed out that there is no "one-size-fits-all" solution to these problems, but enhancing competition is an important starting point, and decentralization is a key path to achieving competition: through a shared data layer, anyone can build different clients on top of it. He revealed that since the beginning of this year, he has been using decentralized social tools for reading and posting, with all content synchronized across platforms such as X, Lens, Farcaster, and Bluesky via Firefly. He also criticized some crypto social projects for deviating from their original purpose, excessively viewing "token issuance" as innovation, and attempting to create price bubbles around individuals to incentivize creators. However, practice shows that such models often reward existing social capital rather than content quality, and the token lifespan is short. Vitalik emphasized that money and social interaction are not inherently conflicting; the key lies in whether they truly serve the content itself, such as a subscription-based support model, rather than being designed as a speculative asset. In his view, decentralized social networking should be driven by teams genuinely concerned with the "essence of social interaction." Vitalik acknowledged the Aave team's long-term maintenance of Lens and expressed anticipation for the direction of the new team, believing they are more focused on solving real social problems. He stated that in the coming year, he will be more vocal on decentralized social platforms and encourage more users to participate in ecosystems like Lens and Farcaster, moving beyond the information-confrontational environment of a single platform and exploring new forms of interaction.
